nasb.text: and He said to them, “Thus it is written, that the Christ would suffer and rise again from the dead the third day,

esv.text: and said to them, “Thus it is written, that the Christ should suffer and on the third day rise from the dead,

cnv.text: 又說：“經上這樣記著：基督必須受害，第三天從死人中復活。

ccb.text: 又对他们说：“圣经上说，基督必受害，然后在第三天从死里复活，

csbs.text: 又对他们说：“经上这样记着：基督必须受难，然后在第三天从死人中复活，
